codes.title: JSON_OBJECT_REQUIRED
codes.description: JSON artifact payload is missing, malformed, or not an object.

codes.title: SCHEMA_MISMATCH
codes.description: Artifact schema does not match the required matrix schema.

codes.title: MATRIX_REGISTRY_INVALID
codes.description: Declared adapter matrix registry violates the frozen v50 contract.

codes.title: MATRIX_INPUT_INVALID
codes.description: Matrix evaluation input payload is missing or violates the frozen grammar.

codes.title: MATRIX_REPORT_INVALID
codes.description: Matrix parity report data is invalid or violates the frozen parity contract.

codes.title: CROSS_ARTIFACT_HASH_MISMATCH
codes.description: Cross-artifact hash or identity binding drift was detected while building the matrix report.

codes.title: MATRIX_LANE_COMPLETENESS_VIOLATION
codes.description: Declared matrix lanes are missing, duplicated, or otherwise incomplete.

codes.title: CONTRACT_REGISTRY_INVALID
codes.description: Matrix diagnostic registry contract is missing or invalid.
